# Provyx

> Provyx is a healthcare provider intelligence company that delivers NPI-verified contact data, practice firmographics, and location intelligence across 40+ medical specialties. Built for healthcare marketing agencies, medical device sales teams, healthcare SaaS vendors, and pharma sales teams who need accurate B2B data without $50K+ annual contracts. Pay per record, delivered in days, sourced from the public NPI registry, state business filings, and commercial databases.

Provyx differs from incumbents like Definitive Healthcare, IQVIA, and ZoomInfo by offering per-record pricing and custom list builds instead of locked annual subscriptions. Data covers ~170 pages of specialty-specific provider intelligence including practice ownership, technology stack, social profiles, and direct contact information. The company specializes in hard-to-find verticals where generic B2B tools fall short: medical spas, IV therapy clinics, behavioral health, and independent specialty practices.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://getprovyx.com/): Healthcare provider data across 40+ specialties with NPI verification and per-record pricing
- [Pricing](https://getprovyx.com/pricing/): Pay-per-record pricing with no annual contracts, custom list building costs, and enrichment tiers
- [About](https://getprovyx.com/about/): Founder background, data sourcing methodology, and company story
- [Services Overview](https://getprovyx.com/services/): Full catalog of provider data products and custom list building

## Services

- [Provider Contact Data](https://getprovyx.com/services/provider-contact-data/): NPI-verified provider contact information including email, phone, and practice affiliation
- [Practice Location Data](https://getprovyx.com/services/practice-location-data/): Multi-location practice mapping with addresses, counts, and ownership structures
- [Practice Firmographics](https://getprovyx.com/services/practice-firmographics/): Revenue estimates, employee counts, years in business, and specialty details
- [Technology Detection](https://getprovyx.com/services/technology-detection/): EHR, practice management, and marketing tech stack detection for medical practices
- [Social Profiles](https://getprovyx.com/services/social-profiles/): LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram profiles for provider outreach
- [Custom List Building](https://getprovyx.com/services/custom-list-building/): Bespoke provider lists built to specialty, geography, and firmographic criteria
- [Physician Outreach Campaigns](https://getprovyx.com/services/physician-outreach-campaigns/): Done-for-you outreach to verified provider lists
- [Event Marketing](https://getprovyx.com/services/event-marketing/): Provider data and targeted advertising for trade shows and CME events

## Competitor Comparisons

- [Provyx vs Definitive Healthcare](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-definitive-healthcare/): Definitive Healthcare alternative with per-record pricing, no annual contract lock-in
- [Provyx vs IQVIA](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-iqvia/): IQVIA OneKey alternative for teams that need provider data without enterprise pricing
- [Provyx vs ZoomInfo](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-zoominfo/): Why generic B2B databases fail for healthcare and what to use instead
- [Provyx vs Apollo](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-apollo/): Apollo comparison for healthcare-specific provider data needs
- [Provyx vs Cognism](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-cognism/): Cognism alternative with healthcare specialty depth
- [Provyx vs Doximity](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-doximity/): Doximity alternative for B2B sales teams (not clinician networking)
- [Provyx vs Komodo Health](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-komodo-health/): Komodo Health alternative for B2B data without claims pricing
- [Provyx vs Veeva OpenData](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-veeva-opendata/): Veeva alternative for non-pharma teams needing provider data
- [Provyx vs Ribbon Health](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-ribbon-health/): Ribbon Health alternative for B2B sales use cases
- [Provyx vs AcuityMD](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-acuitymd/): AcuityMD alternative for medical device teams
- [Provyx vs Lusha](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-lusha/): Lusha alternative with NPI verification
- [Provyx vs D&B Hoovers](https://getprovyx.com/compare/provyx-vs-dnb-hoovers/): D&B Hoovers alternative for healthcare vertical
- [All Comparisons](https://getprovyx.com/compare/): Index of all healthcare data vendor comparisons

- [Definitive Healthcare Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/definitive-healthcare-alternative/): Alternatives to Definitive Healthcare with pricing comparison
- [IQVIA Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/iqvia-alternative/): Alternatives to IQVIA OneKey
- [ZoomInfo Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/zoominfo-alternative/): ZoomInfo alternatives for healthcare teams
- [Doximity Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/doximity-alternative/): Doximity alternatives for B2B use cases
- [Komodo Health Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/komodo-health-alternative/): Komodo Health alternatives
- [Salesforce Health Cloud Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/salesforce-health-cloud-alternative/): Salesforce Health Cloud alternatives for provider data
- [Veeva OpenData Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/veeva-opendata-alternative/): Veeva OpenData alternatives
- [AcuityMD Alternative](https://getprovyx.com/alternatives/acuitymd-alternative/): AcuityMD alternatives for medical device sales

## Use Cases by Audience

- [Healthcare Marketing Agencies](https://getprovyx.com/for/healthcare-marketing-agencies/): Provider data for agencies running campaigns for healthcare clients
- [Medical Device Sales](https://getprovyx.com/for/medical-device-sales/): Territory data, KOL identification, and hospital decision-maker targeting
- [Pharma Sales](https://getprovyx.com/for/pharma-sales/): Physician targeting, prescriber data, and compliance-safe outreach lists
- [Healthcare SaaS](https://getprovyx.com/for/healthcare-saas/): ICP data for healthcare SaaS vendors targeting practices and hospitals
- [Health IT](https://getprovyx.com/for/health-it/): Provider and facility data for health IT sales teams
- [Medical Staffing](https://getprovyx.com/for/medical-staffing/): Contact data for medical staffing and recruitment agencies
- [Healthcare Consulting](https://getprovyx.com/for/healthcare-consulting/): Market analysis and decision-maker data for healthcare consultancies

## Use Cases by Task

- [Healthcare Sales Prospecting](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/healthcare-sales-prospecting/): Building qualified provider prospect lists
- [Medical Device Territory Planning](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/medical-device-territory-planning/): Territory mapping with practice density and prescriber data
- [Healthcare ABM](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/healthcare-abm/): Account-based marketing to health systems and multi-location practices
- [Healthcare CRM Enrichment](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/healthcare-crm-enrichment/): Cleaning and enriching existing healthcare CRM data
- [EHR Install Base Targeting](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/ehr-install-base-targeting/): Targeting practices by their current EHR vendor
- [Health System Org Chart Mapping](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/health-system-org-chart-mapping/): Mapping decision-makers at multi-facility health systems
- [NPI Data Enrichment](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/npi-data-enrichment/): Enriching records with data from the NPI registry
- [Hospital Supply Chain Decision Makers](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/hospital-supply-chain-decision-makers/): Identifying value analysis committees and supply chain leaders
- [Behavioral Health Provider Targeting](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/behavioral-health-provider-targeting/): Mental health and behavioral health practice targeting
- [Telehealth Provider Targeting](https://getprovyx.com/use-cases/telehealth-provider-targeting/): Telehealth and virtual care provider lists

## Resources and Guides

- [Healthcare Data Vendor Comparison](https://getprovyx.com/resources/healthcare-data-vendor-comparison/): Side-by-side comparison of major healthcare data vendors
- [Provider Data Buying Guide](https://getprovyx.com/resources/provider-data-buying-guide/): How to evaluate and purchase provider contact data
- [NPI Registry Guide](https://getprovyx.com/resources/npi-registry-guide/): Complete guide to the NPI registry and how to use it
- [NPPES vs Commercial Provider Data](https://getprovyx.com/resources/nppes-vs-commercial-provider-data/): Differences between NPPES public data and commercial vendors
- [Cost of Bad Provider Data](https://getprovyx.com/resources/cost-of-bad-provider-data/): Real cost of bounce rates and decay in healthcare CRM data
- [ROI of Clean Provider Data](https://getprovyx.com/resources/roi-clean-provider-data/): ROI calculation framework for provider data investments
- [CRM Data Decay in Healthcare](https://getprovyx.com/resources/crm-data-decay-healthcare/): Data decay rates for healthcare CRM systems
- [Healthcare Data Providers for Small Teams](https://getprovyx.com/resources/healthcare-data-providers-small-teams/): Vendor options for teams under 20 reps
- [Healthcare ABM Strategy](https://getprovyx.com/resources/healthcare-abm-strategy/): Building an ABM motion for healthcare targets
- [Medical Device Territory Planning Guide](https://getprovyx.com/resources/medical-device-territory-planning-guide/): Step-by-step territory planning for med device teams
- [KOL Identification for Medical Devices](https://getprovyx.com/resources/kol-identification-medical-devices/): Finding and prioritizing key opinion leaders
- [Healthcare Value Analysis Committee Guide](https://getprovyx.com/resources/healthcare-value-analysis-committee-guide/): Selling to hospital VACs
- [Hospital Buying Cycle Guide](https://getprovyx.com/resources/hospital-buying-cycle-guide/): How hospitals actually buy equipment and software

## Specialty Email Lists

- [Chiropractor Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/chiropractor-email-list/): NPI-verified chiropractor contacts
- [Optometrists Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/optometrists-email-list/): Optometrist and eye care provider contacts
- [Psychiatrists Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/psychiatrists-email-list/): Psychiatrist contact database
- [Therapists Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/therapists-email-list/): Licensed therapist and counselor contacts
- [Orthodontists Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/orthodontists-email-list/): Orthodontist and pediatric dental contacts
- [Med Spa Owners Contact List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/med-spa-owners-contact-list/): Medical spa owner contacts
- [IV Infusion Therapy Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/iv-infusion-therapy-email-list/): IV therapy clinic contacts
- [Rheumatologists Email List](https://getprovyx.com/resources/rheumatologists-email-list/): Rheumatology specialist contacts

## Optional

- [Blog](https://getprovyx.com/blog/): Healthcare sales and data operations articles
- [Case Studies](https://getprovyx.com/case-studies/): Client case studies and outcomes
- [Glossary](https://getprovyx.com/glossary/): Healthcare data terminology reference
- [Providers Directory](https://getprovyx.com/providers/): Hub and spoke directory of 17 specialty categories and ~130 subtypes
- [Contact](https://getprovyx.com/contact/): Contact form for custom list requests
